title: Iran Supreme Leader's message to US: Mojtaba Khamenei calls Trump's signature worthless, issues new warning
summary_full: Iran's Supreme Leader warned the United States of "unforgettable lessons" if attacks continued. He declared President Trump's signature "worthless and invalid" amid escalating conflict. Tehran suspended commitments under a recent interim agreement, citing US breaches. Both nations exchanged strikes on military and infrastructure targets. Regional security and global energy supplies remain a concern.
